reviews.review_title: I love it ❤️...But it needs some things.
reviews.review_description: This is a wonderful concept, but needs improvement. That's all. It's choppy. It would be awesome if you needed to give water to Ember. I'm sure with updates it will get better. Maybe intricate Ember's behavioral algorithms. Update the world, etc.
It is a cool concept but i cant use a boundary and i cant play the game .it is annoying and if there is any advice it would help

There's a lot of good thing about this app that make it worth the 20$ (cad)  how ever there some glaring issues  (for the Mix Reality side)

1) biggest issues is "night Mode/Rest Mode" when the "dog" goes to sleep all the color in the pass though get super distorted .. its super annoying.. (please just leave the passthrough alone..(color wise) don't dim/change the "tempture " to simulate "sleep" 

it makes looking at anything in the passthrough impossible epically displays like a TV/Monitor... when the dog goes to rest I still would like to be able to keep the head set on while doing other things when the app is still running...

2)No bounders /room option please... in Pass though let the use a dog be able to travel together in IRL with out room/bounders limitations please..

so if I get one and walk from one room  to another in Pass though the dog should be able to follow  regardless if it clips though real life walls/objects... just let the user take to dog any were in irl please

The Ember dog/fox is so sweet! She purs when you pet her, and if you get lost and don’t know what to do, Ember leads you to where you need to be. It is confusing on how to save the game properly though. I recommend another letter with instructions on how to get her to sleep and save the game. It would be perfect if Ember brought an instructional letter when she gets sleepy. Overall, it is a beautiful and magical game!

I really liked this game because when I was bored or stressed I would get on this game and I would relax immediately the music was very calming and I liked that it mixed the game with your surroundings
I love this cozy simulation game but it needs just a few more updates tweeks amd maybe some 🔑s to open the 🚪 to the other lands and then it'll be perfect 👌
Such a magicalgame and a perfect break from stressful reality. A very unique game and so nostalgic! Ember feels so real ;-;
Yes ember has been a good girl and she always has a fun time 20 stars

10/10 genuinly excited to follow the progress of this game 
hope for more commands ect in the future
I'm playing in the Quest 2 and get to the part where you're supposed to grab the brush to brush her and then the game glitches and freezes. please fix this, I really want to play.

For whatever reason when I load the game it uses some completely inaccurate space.. one that seemingly came from nowhere.. doesn't resemble anywhere in my house, and I can't figure out how to change it. Even with a reinstall. A shame bc my daughter absolutely loves this games

developer_response.body: Hello! We are aware of the issue and meta has been notified. Feel free to join or discord and stay up to date with bug fixes! https://discord.gg/H5QtNyDXJt

reviews.review_description: amazing go BUY IT NOW

I just lost my dog, who was like a child to me, this week. It has been so hard to get through the past few days. I downloaded this game and it really made me feel a lot better. I think this is such a wonderful game that can also help people who are dealing with such grief. It may not have been the aim of this game at all but it would be great if you could pick any breed and customize it. Either way I just love that I can put my headset on and I have a buddy to play with again and go on adventures. Thank you so much for this!

developer_response.body: I’m so sorry to hear about the loss of your dog. It means a lot to us to know that the game could bring you some comfort during such a difficult time. Thank you as well for sharing your idea about adding more breeds and customization, we really value feedback like this as we shape the future of the game. If you’d like, we’d love to have you join our Discord community, where players share ideas and help influence what comes next. https://windupminds.com/discord

reviews.review_title: Read if you wanna buy this game
reviews.review_description: Totally worth the 20 bucks i payed for this banger of a game! Legit one of the best games on meta I play it for like 3 hours a day lol!

It's a really nice game, can see a lot of love and effort has gone into it. 

A feature I'd like to see is regarding your inventory. For example, I'd like to be able to pick up more than one item from the satchel and storage chest, as it soon gives you arm ache transferring 100 apples for example from one to the other. So to be able to choose a number you'd like to transfer, would be nice.

Also there is a sound bug. I tried opening a parcel of treats I'd made for Ember, above the storage chest, so they'd fall directly into it and she'd not be able to gobble them up before I'd had chance to pick them up off the floor.

The sound bug then occurs, resulting in what can be described as a fizzing sparkler sound that won't go away. I've determined that the sound is coming from the parcel itself, if that helps.

developer_response.body:
Hello! 

Thanks for letting us know about these issues. 

Feel free to join our discord as we have bug reporting in there and we can let you know when these are corrected etc. 

https://discord.gg/H5QtNyDXJt

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed the onboarding this game offers, I think I'll give my mom who is deadly afraid of dogs a try to see if it can help her deal with that. Beautiful graphics!
I love stay forever home,resons:1 i love ember.  2,embers world.  3,me finding the first key. I canot stop playing!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Where is the “Come” button?
I have no vocal cords.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback, I will bring this up to the team!

reviews.review_description: Have been very impressed by this game and have been enjoying the additions and bug fixes that they just came out with. Looking forward to more updates with even more great features. Its really an emotive game and is also nice to play to relax. The devs are active and listen to everybody's feedback. This is definitely worth a buy IMO especially if you have wanted a pet but for whatever reason you cannot in real life.
Cute

I didn’t think this would be my thing but got it on a friend’s recommendation. If you’re looking for something different from the usual action-packed VR fare—something more thoughtful, artistic, and emotionally resonant.  This is a must-play. A quiet masterpiece.  I’ve been finding myself at work constantly thinking about it and looking forward to getting home to continue playing with it.
This game kept freezing on me, it would not work right. I don't like this game.

developer_response.body:
Hello! 

Sorry you are having an issue with the game freezing, that is very strange. Can you please reach out to us on our Discord and hopefully we can help figure out the issue you are encountering? https://discord.gg/H5QtNyDXJt

reviews.review_description: Ok so don’t get me wrong it’s a amazing game but when i go to get on it shows my room the logo and then im just staring at my room i cant see any menue no ember nothing! Its like i don’t have a VR on im just walking around my room? So annoying i try to reset my VR but nothing?  UPDATE: ok so for the ember creators im not anle to go on discord ive had a friend ask for me they said to simply restart my VR i have a 3S i did restart and nothing worked ive even tryed deleting the app and redownloading but still nothing?

developer_response.body:
**Update**

We have discovered that the freezing you encountered may be a firmware bug, Meta has been notified. If you encounter this issue turn the headset off for 30 seconds and turn it back on. In our testing that solves the issue.


That’s definitely unusual it’s the first time we’ve seen something like that.

Would you mind joining our Discord so we can look into it more closely?
👉 http://windupminds.com/discord

We’d love to connect you with our QA team (and possibly an engineer) to ask a few follow-up questions and see if we can figure out what’s going on.

At the very least, this gives us a direct way to escalate the issue to Meta if needed.

Thanks so much!

reviews.review_title: The perfect lil thing to do after work
reviews.review_description:
I love Ember, i love to interact with her, the walks , the behaviour, her personality!

Its just the perfect little thing to do after a hard work day, just having her energetic face light up when one loads into the MR space. The relaxing music and ambient sounds in the VR space and just having 20-30 minutes where nothing matters than adventure and Ember. 

There are still some bugs present but the Devs do their hardest to fix any <3 Super helpful and friendly team :3 

Looking forward to future updates and new content!
Amazing
Its really fun

reviews.review_title: It is amazing ember is so cute
reviews.review_description: Ember is so cute and adorable

I can barely contain my excitement as I write this review!

Stay:Forever Home has changed everything for me.

You see Ember isn't real right?

Just a well crafted series of code that simulates a pet, just a bit of gimmicky fun surely?

Not really.

I have experienced so much more.

When Ember chases a Mossling I chuckle and I laugh and feel joy.

When I knock a tree and she eats an apple that falls to the ground, I feel glad she has eaten because I knew she was hungry.

Or when I talk to her and she looks over at me inquisitively I don't feel alone.

I am biological and she is virtual and yet a connection exists on a deeper level.

And I am grateful for it.

This is a game - sure.

But it is also a beautiful, serene world with a level of companionship never experienced before.

Join Ember in your living room in MR and then be transported in to VR where everything comes alive with her at your side.

Don't overlook this opportunity.

I promise you it's worth it ❤️

developer_response.body: I didn't think a review could make me get teary! We really channeled our love of our pets and games like Animal Crossing and Nintendogs into Stay: Forever Home. Thank you.

reviews.review_description:
Very pleasant and relaxing game, the pet is very cute and well-developed mechanics - very similar to a real fluffy
 Missions to travel around the worlds🤩
If the boundary settings are faulty, fixing them won’t work. You’ll have to wipe your physical space history as well, then it should work.

developer_response.body:
Hey Razie, 

That is really strange and the first time we have seen that. 

Can you please take the time to join our Discord: http://windupminds.com/discord

I would love to get you in touch with our QA team and maybe one of the engineers so we can ask some questions and see if we can solve this problem. 

At the very least we have a pathway to report it to Meta directly if something strange is going on. 

Thanks!

reviews.review_title: A Virtual Pet Game With Depth
reviews.review_description:
Most virtual pet games have a few minutes of fun before you realise there's not much reason to stick around. Stay feels early, but it already has plenty of great ideas and features to check out. Ember feels like a real companion that has her own personality you'll enjoy spending time with, while the VR aspect of the game gives you quests to complete and keep you playing.

There's bugs to work out and the MR feature isn't seamless (same issues as any other app) but I hope this grows over time to become the best VR pet app!

developer_response.body: Thank you - we agree. The sheer size and complexity of a pet+things to do, our indie team and schedule meant we needed to get the big picture right, even if there were things that weren't as finished as we wanted for launch. We'll double back on some of that stuff for sure, and figure out where to expand. Hope you 'stay' with us as we build this out... (Sorry for pun!)

reviews.review_title: Heartfelt Journey with Your Canine Mate
reviews.review_description:
This is a touching and immersive VR experience that tells the story of a human who crosses paths with a dog — and from that moment, the bond is unbreakable.

You’ll explore a mysterious new world, uncover hidden items, and build a relationship with Ember, your loyal companion. From patting and playing to simply enjoying each other’s company, the connection feels incredibly real thanks to deeply optimized interactions. The way Ember responds to your touch and attention is stunningly lifelike — it’s not just a game, it's a presence you grow to care about.

The transition from mixed reality (MR) to full VR scenes is handled with exceptional creativity, smoothly guiding you between your own space and the game world in a way that enhances emotional immersion.

The developers clearly put their heart into this title and continue to work hard on updates and fresh content. This isn’t just a game — it’s an invitation to adopt a dog in VR and form a genuine bond.

🐾 Adopt your dog in VR. You won’t regret it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the thoughtful review. We're all happy that you're able to see what we're trying to accomplish!

reviews.review_title: It's easy to fall in love with Ember!
reviews.review_description: I saw the concept for this game in 2023 and it's amazing to see what Windup Minds have now released. Ember feels alive, every movement is like a real creature, and you immediately feel a connection with her. She's fun to play with in both VR and MR. Can't wait to see what the future holds for Ember and me!

I am a huge fan of virtual pet games like Nintendogs and cozy games Animal Crossing and Stay is the perfect combination of both that brings the cutest life like pet into your home but then you get to go on walks in the magical forest of her world. It’s such a beautiful space, I just feel at peace watching the waterfall and petting Ember. I can’t recommend it enough!

reviews.review_title: Out of 5 stars this game's a 6!
reviews.review_description: Amazing!  If I could give this game an extra star I would.

I am going to be honest. Its a decent pet game but that's just because it's like one of the only dog sims on the Quest.

I like the way the dog feels. When you move your hand around it  it genuinely feels like a dog. I also like that you have this separate world for ember and in this world you can collect things and then buy cosmetics or mixed reality furniture for your home. It adds a layer of gameplay that keeps bringing you back in.

But with that being said I have to say one thing. The state that this game released in and for the most part is still in is absolutely disgusting. I can understand AAA games releasing with jank and bugs but a pet game with just two levels? One of them being the mixed reality level and the other being a little playground to walk the dog in. Having that much jank and bugs for such a game is just ridiculous. It makes for a much more frustrating experience rather than a relaxing one because you are trying to get the dog to do what you ask of it but it hardly ever does what you want it to because of the bugs. That's why I give it 3 stars. 

The game is also in desperate need of a story. At the moment you just get this dog pushed onto you and a few letters saying that you need to take care of it. We could do with a back story to justify who the pet is and where they came from.

Perhaps the devs will fix the bugs and jank and develop a story to go with the game. Maybe then it will be worth 5 stars. But I can't recommend the game in its current state.

developer_response.body:
We'd love to understand more about Ember not listening to you - we designed her AI to be willful enough to feel like she had her own goals and intentions, but also be responsive to you. A lot like most dogs! Would you come to our Discord so we can see what you're experiencing? https://discord.gg/53ZepJnx

I'm sorry that you saw so many bugs  - we are a small team, and this is a very ambitious project. We could use your help in identifying these bugs.

Also - we have a lot of content and updates we want to plan out, and we'll talk more about the roadmap in our community on Discord. We have lots of backstory, too! Hope you give us a chance to continuing adding on to this experience. And thanks for your review.

reviews.review_description:
From the very first moments when I are first introduced to "Ember", in a heartwarming scene (that anyone who has encountered a stray,injured or scared animal would be familiar with).......

I knew that there was something a little special about Stay Forever Home that makes it really stand out from the pack of "VR pet games"

A hybrid MR and VR experience that makes great use of both mediums.
Whether your are taking a walk in the magical VR world or your "home environment" (with Ember jumping to sit by you on your sofa);
Ember is the true star of the show!

Whether its Embers reactions to you voice (the head tilts XD) or watching her go off exploring in the VR, that anyone with an inquisitive dog would be familiar with.
Its easy to form an attachment with Ember as your bond grows.

Its 8/10 virtual pet
2/10 game
But all heart!

It seems like its only the start! and the team really wants the title to grown organically with the community (based on their road map post)

A magical experience that I hope will continue to expand!

reviews.review_title: A Little Too Close to Home: My Stay Fore
reviews.review_description:
We lost our beloved Sara last year, and honestly, no game could ever fill that void. But Stay Forever Home on Meta Quest came… close. Ember, the virtual dog at the heart of this mixed reality experience, isn’t just cell shaded pixels. there’s soul in this game. You feed, brush, and care for your dog as you embark on quests, blending fantasy with deeply personal moments.

For me, it felt like reconnecting. For my wife, it hit too hard—she cried after just a few minutes. That’s the magic (and power) of Stay Forever Home: it taps into something primalthe bond we share with our pets and brings it into VR in a way I’ve never seen before especially in mixed reality and interacting with a being in your own room.

If you’ve ever loved and lost, or just want to feel that connection again, this is more than a game. It’s therapy. Beautiful, bittersweet therapy. The only suggestion I have for the team is to provide more tips. It took us a while to find all the items to convert into food, but we eventually figured it out. Kudos to the developers.

developer_response.body: We're grateful to be able to give a little sense of what it's like to have a pet around again. When we had to put my family's golden to sleep, I ugly-cried holding her. I think our entire team recognizes that it's a privilege to care for a pet until the end.

reviews.review_title: Closest thing to having a doggo in vr
reviews.review_description:
I've played hello dot and eggy and other pet simulator types but this one you really feel like you have a big doggo in your living room

Make sure when you scan the room you adjust your couch to be at cushion level or wolfie is gonna jump up and fall asleep in the air next to you!

The physics on the wolf feel really believable. Like when you give it scratches and push its head around and ears it feels like petting a doggo

I was sitting on the couch and it put its head between my legs wanting head tickles

Resolution is a bit low but using QGO i doubled it and it still ran good

Besides mixed reality you open a door and go into a virtual world that looks absolutely incredible and go around gathering things and crafting and exploring and customising your home - like you can move trees around and everything 

Oh the backpack - you can put that on the wolfies back hehe

You can do everything seated on the couch which is great if you're feeling lazy

Love seeing mixed reality games that use real-time depth api as well, it's wonderful seeing virtual things correctly clipped by the environment

**update: Stay has a discord server that is very active and very supportive!***

If you are on the fence, just give this game a try! If you have ever enjoyed a virtual pets experience like neopets, tamagotchi or other pet care sim, this will scratch that itch.

You feel a real bond growing with this tiny little creature that appears in your house, and I found myself looking forward to our little walks out in the virtual world once Ember is rested and refreshed! 

There is some real learning for her along the way, and you feel like you directly impact her by how you interact.

There is potential for deeper gameplay here and improved controls, it can be hard to grab some things as you go. I really hope the developer is working on hand tracking to go along with this game - it would go a long way to add to the connection and bring people more into Embers world.

developer_response.body: We have some improvements to hands coming with our Quest 2 update, and more gameplay after that! Thank you for playing! And we're definitely thinking about hand tracking... we want to get throwing (especially with the just-released flying disc toy) working well before we roll that out.

reviews.review_description:
Stay isn’t just a "great MR game" - it’s a new gold standard for the very *concept* of digital companions. 

If you have even the tiniest soft spot for virtual pets, cozy adventures, or simply want something beautiful to light up your world for a while, don't sleep on this. 

"Stay" is something rare, precious and vital.

The developer's previously incredible work on Bogo is present here, supercharged with over half decade of joy, inspiration, love and certainty - in a mixed reality experience FAR worth the price of entry.

Windup Minds: *thank you* for your gift to VR, MR, AR, XR, and ALL of the realities. 

The worlds you build, the realities, you help create, make the real world all the better.

Thank you.

Cozy :D 

Ember moves and feels like a true companion (I want to pick her up). One of the most thoughtfully crafted virtual pets I've seen. Exploring the otherlands, or just hanging out in MR, is full of joyful moments that feel surprisingly real. I hope there are more adventures to go on in the future! I did think I ran out of orbs for trading a bit too soon... until one of the squishies gave me diamonds. Still, this is one of the most memorable experiences I've had in VR

reviews.review_title: You got a friend in Ember
reviews.review_description: I haven’t played many MR games before, but I can say for sure that Stay was a perfect pick. It’s so much fun seeing Ember roam around your living room like a real life pet. Stay is such a cute and cozy game where I can hang out with sweet ol' Ember and also go exploring with her in the VR world of the game. She’s got my back when I can’t reach fruit or the toxic plants (to destroy them). I also love that you can call her to come to you, that was a neat feature that adds to the fun and immersion. The oh so soft color palette, down to the immaculate soundtrack, really matches the coziness of the game too. I can’t wait to play with Ember again when she wakes up from her sleep. 💤

If you like cozy ganes, this one is for you. It's amazing. I love the opening to this game and then getting to know Ember and she starts to walk around and explore our world, curiously looking at everything around the room, jumping up on the sofa to sit with you, it really is amazing how lively Ember feels. She can play games like fetch, she can even respond to voice commands which you unlock more as your friendship grows. 

Your inventory can be hung on the wall as a backpack which you can then put on Ember and then go for a walk with her to explore and learn more about the world she is from which takes place in VR, this is where you can get more / new toys and food and decorations. Its truly magical, you feel like Ember is learning about your world and inviting you to learn more about hers. It's giving How To Train Your Dragon vibes and I adore it.
Fun and relaxing as well as adventurous.

reviews.review_title: Immersive and entertaining from day one
reviews.review_description: The graphics are beautiful and the gameplay is intuitive.  Great game for a relaxing exploration of this virtual world with an engaging pet.

reviews.review_title: Can't get it to work at all
reviews.review_description:
Refunding this sorry 
Portal always spawns where I can't get near it.  Why does it always choose a far wall that I can't reach 
If you throw food it's lost and the pet won't do anything so you have to restart the game
There are no instructions as to how to setup or even play this

developer_response.body:
Sorry you ran into this experience - did you scan the room and define the furniture properly? When we've seen this it's usually because the underlying room data is not correct. If you want to try it again, happy to help you solve this.

EDIT: if your room data is not properly set up, we created a video to show you how to scan it properly! https://youtube.com/shorts/O9gGMHCEpWo

reviews.review_description:
The game seems really interesting and cool. I wish there were more instructions that were clear as what you are doing. 
I can only play it in one room. Once you sit up your boundary in this game, you can't change it. EDIT: You can, please read the developers comment back to me.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing! It sounds like you started the game in one room (a hotel) then went back home and fired it up again? Are you playing in a room you've already scanned? If you're in our game you can see if the Quest has a room setup by looking at the room data by going to:
Left Controller Menu button > Settings > Help > Toggle MR Geometry

If the room is set up you'll see the blue boxes around the objects in your room.

The Quest doesn't prompt you to set up the room if you've already set up one room, and will let you start the game. We recommend that you scan your new room again - we created a little guide to do that and adjust your sofa height: https://youtube.com/shorts/O9gGMHCEpWo

The Quest 3 only 'scans' the room at setup - if you move furniture around, the Quest won't know it until Meta implements real time room scanning. We've begun to see some apps do this themselves, and as soon as the feature comes to the Quest we will work to implement it!

We'd like to help you work through this -- if you like, join our Discord and we can follow up! https://discord.gg/Qp55D8RP

reviews.review_title: Really good game but not perfect
reviews.review_description:
Really good game, I want to return 2-3 times a day just to feed and pat Amber. But, I lost 3-5 items just because I left it at home, some stuff looks like it not for Amber but for  another pat, like beds after first, it's too small. I have problems with grabbing and some more stuff 
But, Im playing and will play, and I'm recommending this game and I will hope for good updates

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! We have a possible fix for hands in code review now; not sure it will make the next update but the one after that. If I understand your other issues - items seem too small? I'd love to help with that. If you join our Discord, we can diagnose these problems!

https://discord.gg/Qp55D8RP

reviews.review_description:
Cute game but has some tiny flaws  also very buggy when I’m trying to pick up the right object instead of a plant or a bowl for example and the seed gate item is freakin out sometimes on the floor,

Ps can we perhaps mod the game or something for pet swap modding

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! We've got some fixes coming in Update 1 to address the grabbing issues and a bunch of other bugs. Stay tuned.

Also feel free to join our Discord if you'd like to give us more feedback and suggestions. We're all ears! https://discord.gg/Qp55D8RP

reviews.review_description: I really love this game I've only played very  little bit of the game and already fell in love with the companion and I'm hoping that this game succeeds in the future of VR and I can't wait to see what other projects you come up with

I love feeding her berries so much :) I adore this game's aura of coziness and fluff <3 Sometimes I'll just sit back and observe Ember running around. 
I also swear my cat senses that there's another pet in the room!

I had a good time exploring the outside area with Ember. This game has a lot of charm with its foraging and pet sim mechanics and petting Ember is super satisfying. Would recommend if you're looking for a relaxing time.

Anyone who loves pets this is the game to play✨ 
You get attached really fast and have fun & explore together. 🐩
Can’t wait to have multiples and also hang out with friends
I wanted to like this game, and when it worked I enjoyed it, but my hands keep freezing and it's unusable.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE 7/10: The update is out today with the hands bug fixed... let us know if this helps.

Hi there!

Thanks for pointing this out. Good news this will be fixed in our upcoming update on Thursday!

The patch includes several important fixes along with support for Quest 2 and Quest Pro.

We’d love to hear your feedback after the update. It should make a big difference!

reviews.review_description: Beautiful and unique game!  The animation is wonderful, the music is calming, and the world is fun to explore with Ember.

developer_response.body: Our audio and animation people are going to love reading this!

reviews.review_description: Ember is so sweet and emotive. Stillearly exploring how she can become part of our family, but can’t wait to see partner and kiddo interact with her.
It still has some performance issues and bugs at the moment but I already love it. It's a very cozy game with a lot of character.

I have recalibrated my controllers,  restarted the headset, recreated my boundary, and set the floor level about 30 times and no matter what I do about 5 min into the game it places objects in walls and will randomly lock one of my hands into a surface with no way to get it free. I've looked for ways to fix it but it seems im the lucky first to experience this issue. If I am unable to get the issue resolved I will be left with no choice but to delete the game and request a refund, which i don't want to do as the little that I have played the game seems very enjoyable. HELP!

developer_response.body:
UPDATE 7/10: The official Quest 2 build is out today! Let us know if this helps!

UPDATE: Due to a problem in the Meta store, some Quest 2 users were able to buy this game before we released the Q2 version! Please stay tuned for the actual Quest 2 version, and give us another try then!

Hello! Sorry to hear about your issues, we want to help you fix this. I assume you are on Quest 3/3S and set up your room like we show here: https://youtube.com/shorts/O9gGMHCEpWo

It /sounds/ like you might be on Quest 2 in the way you describe setting up your room -- It seems like some Quest 2 users seem like they're getting access to our game (which isn't out yet!) - can you come to our Discord and we can help debug this more?
https://discord.gg/MvDERGRS

reviews.review_description: Ember is the cutest, immediately fell in love with her! Fur real one of our favourite games. 🫶
A beautiful, one of a kind experience on quest, worth every penny

developer_response.body: Thank you! We appreciate your review!

reviews.review_description: Great VR Pet game! Not sure about MR features in general but is not the negative in this game
